content_body:
Galaxy Bowling is a great way to spend time with family/friends, get a little exercise, and have fun no matter what the weather is. Galaxy Bowling has 16 lanes , Arcades, Billiards, Party Room, food, and so much more fun. Located in Blairsville... just a quick trip up Hwy 515 from Blue Ridge, GA. After bowling, there is a movie theater in the same parking lot. So make a day of it and enjoy some family fun!

WHEELCHAIR ACCESSIBLE

RATES (Per Person, Per Game)

FRIDAY & SATURDAY

$4.25 Reg. rate

 Special - 3 Games includes shoes $14.00

WEDNESDAY & SUNDAY

$3.00 Reg. rate

SHOE RENTAL - $3.00

NON-PROFIT GROUPS/EVENTS call

706-745-4444

for more information on days, times and rates!
title: Galaxy Bowling
